name: better-nemo-desktop
description: BetterNemo Desktop - 编程猫扩展框架桌面版

scripts.build:wasm: cd rust-renderer && $env:CARGO_TARGET_DIR='..\target' cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen ..\target\wasm32-unknown-unknown\debug\bn_renderer.wasm --out-dir ..\public\wasm --target web
scripts.build:frontend:full: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:frontend
